name: Flag or Rage
short_description: Flag or Rage is a physics-based platformer game for up to 8 players! Choose and place obstacles and platforms, cooperate with your teammates to reach the top and capture the flag, or cunningly hinder your opponents and survive alone.
detailed_description:
Flag or Rage is a physics-based platformer game for up to 8 players!

Choose and place obstacles and platforms, cooperate with your teammates to reach the top and capture the flag, or cunningly hinder your opponents and survive alone.

You can't play alone!! I recommend playing with a friend.

Gameplay

Compete against opponents to choose obstacles or platforms and place them.

Use various items to step on your teammates and opponents, reach the top, and capture the flag.

As night falls, darkness creeps in. Avoid the darkness and survive alone.

Even after reaching the top or being eliminated, you can still hinder the remaining opponents. Continuously disrupt and seek revenge on your enemies.

Duo Mode (2vs2vs2vs2)

Cooperate with your teammate and sabotage your opponents.

Squad Mode (4vs4)

Work closely with your teammates to overcome seemingly impossible terrain and reach the top.

Solo Mode

Everyone is your enemy. Step on your opponents, reach the top, or survive alone.

Key Features

  • Online multiplayer for up to 8 players.

  • Unique and competitive obstacle selection mechanism.

  • Two victory conditions: reach the top or survive.

  • Consistent and cohesive graphics.

supported_languages: English, Russian, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese
